about.heroTagline: Predict football scores, compete with friends, and climb the scoreboard. How well do you really know the beautiful game?
about.step1Desc: Browse real football competitions from leagues around the world and choose the ones you want to follow.
about.step2Desc: Submit your score predictions for upcoming matches before kick-off. Change your mind? Update anytime.
about.step3Desc: Earn points based on how accurate your predictions are and compete with friends on the leaderboard.
about.scoringSubtitle: Every finished match is scored automatically. The closer your prediction, the more points you earn.
about.exactScoreDesc: You nailed the exact final score
about.correctOutcomeDesc: You got the winner (or draw) right
about.realCompetitionsDesc: Follow real football leagues and tournaments with live data from around the world.
about.scorePredictionsDesc: Predict exact match scores before kick-off and earn points for accuracy.
about.liveTrackingDesc: Watch your predictions play out in real time as matches are updated automatically.
about.scoreboardDesc: Compete with friends and other players on the leaderboard to prove who knows football best.
about.formGuideDesc: See recent form and head-to-head stats to make smarter predictions.
about.mobileReadyDesc: Play on any device — the app is fully responsive and works great on phones and tablets.
about.ctaSubtitle: Create your free account and start predicting today.
